display_name: 兔子镜小剧场 / Rabbit Mirror Theater（小小维修兔 v1.14 iOS 交互与翻面修复版）
author: Toto
description: TEST build: adds an iOS-safe parent-tap fallback for unlabeled checked interactions and WebKit 3D flip compatibility to prevent mirrored or double-visible card faces, while keeping all repairs scoped to the current RabbitMirror display DOM.
